title: Junior Backend Developer
description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative providing developers with PostgreSQL, authentication, and real-time capabilities. We're seeking a Junior Backend Developer to help scale our platform. Work hybrid from Indianapolis and contribute to the infrastructure developers love.
responsibilities: Develop backend features using TypeScript and Node.js
Design and optimize PostgreSQL queries and database schemas
Build RESTful and GraphQL APIs that power developer applications
Write tests and improve code quality across the platform
Collaborate with the team on system design and performance improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent experience)
